title: HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING - 211info
text: CITY OF GRESHAM HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community members a service to report illegal campsites or issues around them such as excessive trash, noise complaints, repeated issues of overly aggressive behavior, or public intoxication. 1333 NW Eastman Parkway Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (503) 618-3000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 618-3000 Main phone (503) 823-3333 Non-Emergency Police (503) 618-2373 Utility Billing INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Gresham Services: Public Nuisance Reporting * Homelessness Issues Refuse Collection * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF GRESHAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - LIVABILITY TEAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - RENTAL HOUSING INSPECTION PROGRAM CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF GRESHAM POLICE DEPARTMENT LEGAL ASSISTANCE MODALITIES - EAST COUNTY RESOLUTIONS UTILITIES - UTILITY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF GRESHAM
